steps.t: Nabatínu has suggested asking Khagâmi at Gadim-ûn about the brass button you found at Kôth Rau.
Khagâmi recognizes the brass button as one belonging to Tâklu, who was one of her travelling companions when her caravan was attacked. She begs you to…
Rhadrog agrees that the prisoners at Kôth Rau should be freed, and also hopes to learn why they are keeping prisoners at all. You should meet Rhadrog …
You have gotten the keys from the Utûgi gaolers that will open the cages. You should free the prisoners from their captivity.
You have freed many prisoners from their cages at Kôth Rau. You should return to Rhadrog outside of the Ordâkhai stronghold.
You have freed many prisoners from their cages at Kôth Rau and returned to Gadim-ûn. You should talk to Khagâmi, who had asked you to rescue them.
You have freed many prisoners from their cages at Kôth Rau and returned to Gadim-ûn. You should talk to Tâklu, an acquaintance of Khagâmi that you rec…
You asked Tâklu what the enemy was doing with the prisoners at Kôth Rau and did not learn much. They were subjected to torture, and the most unfortuna…
